text.title: Property-Based Tests From LLM-Inferred Invariants Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real deployments of this methodology. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Agent proposes `f(x) == g(x)` without citing g. Property runs, finds 'bug' that is actually a false invariant.
antipattern.fix: Reject any invariant whose source_citation is empty or unanchored to docstring/types/example.

antipattern.symptom: Agent only writes round-trip properties. Misses idempotence bugs.
antipattern.fix: Force the agent to explicitly mark each of the five families as applicable/inapplicable with reason.

antipattern.symptom: Property failures cannot be reproduced. CI red, dev clones repo, fails to reproduce, ignores warning.
antipattern.fix: Pin seeds; commit them; CI replays the pinned seed.
